ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distibution
Off Calendar Jul-06-2010 Continued To Jul-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elisabeth Hanowsky for William O'Niell and other potential Heirs. Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Ms. Hanowsky requested a continuance stating that she would be filing a petition for entitlement within 60 days. The Court informed Mr. Weinkauf that an order approving the status report and extending the date for filing of the petition for final distribution was needed. The matter was continued to July 20, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
